title: Progress tracking
excerpt: I’m looking to monitor the overall progress in a project management board. The challenge here is that the tasks are not fixed; they can be created or removed as needed. Furthermore, I’d like to assign weights to each tas…

posts.author: davelight (JaeHyeok Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to monitor the overall progress in a project management board. The challenge here is that the tasks are not fixed; they can be created or removed as needed. Furthermore, I’d like to assign weights to each task based on their estimated completion time.

For instance, if there are a total of four tasks, I want to assign varying weights depending on their estimated time.

In this context, how should I organize the board and formulate the equations

Thank you!

posts.author: Franco (Franco Wiltink)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think you should use a dashboard view and connect the boards you want to see.
I dont know if you can put weights on a task, we just use hours with a date column to track our projects planning. Not easy to explain the whole proces.

posts.author: Rodolfo (Rodolfo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Franco

I’m new to Monday and I’m looking for something like that, is there a tutorial for this?
